Casa Amigavel

  • Home >
  • Portugal >
  • Algarve >
  • Lagos >

LOCATION: Lagos, Algarve

From: £6617 p.w.

Casa Amigavel is a truly remarkable property that offers luxurious accommodation for up to 10 guests across its five lavish bedrooms. This exceptional residence is the result of a collaboration between esteemed local architect Mario Martins, blending the finest Portuguese design with contemporary materials.

Situated in one of the most sought-after natural locations along the Meia Praia / Lagos coastline, adjacent to the Palmares Golf Course, Casa Amigavel provides breathtaking views of the Atlantic Ocean.

The villa spans a single level, separated into two main areas known as the west and east wings divided by a beautifully located courtyard. 

The light-filled living and dining areas in the west wing are thoughtfully equipped with all the amenities one could desire, including heated floors, air-conditioning, and tempered glass windows.

The villa's meticulously maintained gardens showcase native Algarve plants, complementing the 18-meter heated infinity pool and the shaded al-fresco gas BBQ dining area, all just a few steps away from the main living areas.

There is also a fire pit with ample seating for guests to enjoy the stunning location and relax. For a truly indulgent experience, Casa Amigavel features a hot tub deck, offering the perfect spot to enjoy a sunset drink while savouring uninterrupted views of the Atlantic.

Location Map

Property Reviews - 6 Reviews - Average Rating: 5 Stars

  • What a beautiful place!

    Wow what a beautiful place! This stylish holiday retreat is cleverly designed and beautifully furnished. Perfect for a special family holiday or a memorable break with friends. No need to leave the villa if you just want to enjoy the sun, pool, outdoor space and views with family and friends, but authentic bars and restaurants and a lovely beach, within walking distance, or a quick car/taxi ride to the marina for more restaurants and local shopping. What more could you want! Thank you for a wonderful stay in your beautiful holiday home. We will be back!

    Zoey Sheppard - 31/01/2024

  • Everything is so perfect.

    As soon as you walk into this luxurious villa you instantly relax. Everything is so perfect and brilliantly designed. It’s finished off to an exceptionally high standard with a spectacular view, fantastic kitchen and dining area plus huge amount of outside space with affinity pool, hot tub and even a fire pit for those chill out evenings. It’s really close to Lagos, fantastic beaches and beach bars - we can’t wait to go back again this year.

    E Doniger - 01/08/2023
